## What changed
Brief description of the changes.

## Why
What problem does this solve or what feature does this add?

## Testing
How was this tested? Include steps or commands.

## Screenshots
If this is a UI change, include before/after screenshots.

## Checklist
- [ ] Code has been reviewed by AI and manually
- [ ] No console errors or warnings
- [ ] Tested on desktop and mobile browsers
- [ ] Commit messages follow conventions (present tense, imperative)
